testimonial: Kandice was always available at any time of any day, was quick to reply, always positive, and very encouraging. I am honestly still shocked at how she helped me make my goal and dream come true. I did not believe I was quite ready to buy even though I wanted to, and Kandice's reassurance made it happen.! with the help of Kandice and her team. I decided to buy work on my credit get approved. Find the right home closed and moved in all within three months.
Kandice is a great professional and a great friend to work with.  Thanks
Kandice was a pleasure to work with. She's very knowledgeable. The process was painless and we will use her again.

Kanice is very informative. Understands rules/regulations of buying a home. Able to educate us on expectations. Very patient and willing to work around our schedule to help us find our dream home. Kandice stayed active and worked hard for us. We are grateful everyday that Kandice was able to help us find our home!
She is extremely excellent and good at her job and is a superstar of a realtor!
Kandice kept us grounded and focused during the whole process. She was always there to take questions and concerns. Would use her again as my agent and recommend to others. Great Job!!

Working with Kandice Nowak was an incredible experience from the very first showing to closing. She immediately understood what we were looking for and guided us with a perfect mix of professionalism, honesty, and warmth. Kandice’s knowledge of the market and sharp attention to detail gave us complete confidence through every step. She answered  our questions, handled every challenge with ease, and made the entire process feel effortless. It was clear she genuinely cared about helping us find not just a house, but a home that truly fit our lives. Thanks to Kandice’s dedication and negotiation skills with the seller we not only have a wonderful new home but she negotiated a new HVAC system as well. Anyone looking to purchase a new home would be lucky to have a realtor like Kandice.

client: Everett & Angel Bryce, Sand Springs, Oklahoma
testimonial:
Working with Kandice Nowak to buy our first home was an incredible experience. As first-time buyers, we had tons of questions and uncertainty, but Kandice was with us every step of the way. She was patient, knowledgeable, and always made time for us—no matter how big or small our concerns were. Her communication was clear and consistent, and we always felt like we were in great hands.

Kandice truly cared about finding the right home for us. She never pushed or rushed us—just supported and guided us with genuine care and expertise. Her attention to detail, negotiation skills, and knowledge of the market made all the difference.

We couldn’t be happier with our new home, and we owe so much of that to Kandice. She made a stressful process feel smooth, and even fun at times. If you're looking for a dedicated, honest, and passionate realtor, Kandice is the one. We’re so grateful we had her by our side!

Working with Kandice is an absolute pleasure. Her representation of our interests in the sale made the process seamless for us, though the buyers wanted many things we were not willing to meet. She handled all discussions with grace under pressure! Kandice never made me feel like a bother, answering all questions and details with professionalism. 

I highly recommend Kandice as your next realtor!

AWESOME PERSON. Kandice is hands down one of the best Realators I've ever dealt with. HIGHLY HIGHLY RECOMMEND. All in all Centry 21 is a great company to go with. 
Kandice Nowak gets 20 of 10 stars in my book.
Thank You guys so very much.
                                                                                                       Abraham DeSalvo

Kandice was very attentive to my case throughout the whole process and super informal on anything she noticed, very easy to talk with and at the drop of a call she would show me any property. Super awesome personality and customer care. She even shuttled my senior mother to the closing!!!!! Greatest person ever to do business with!
I loved the energy Kandace has. She was always positive towards the sale.

We looked at a lot of homes. Kandice was always willing to contact selling agent for questions about properties. Kandice was very helpful and accomodating to our needs. She was knowledgable about the real estate market for our location. We had many months of contingency but she was always checking in on the sale of our house. Once that happened, Kandice was on fire to make something happen. Kandice took us through the buying process until we signed on the house of our dreams. I would recommend Kandice for anyone in the market for their house.

Kandice was great to work with. She knew exactly what we wanted and looking for. She worked really hard in helping us find our new perfect home. I would highly recommend her to anyone and with definitely use her again.

From the very beginning of working with Kandice she was extremely polite and welcoming. Never in my life did I think I'd meet someone to honest and knowledgeable. You can't go wrong with having her in your corner because she truly knows her business well. She told me what I needed done and when with exact times, I reached out past 5pm a couple times and she went out of her way to answer those questions. If I buy another house I'm calling on Kandice! Thank you so much for all you did for me!
Extremely friendly, easy to talk to, and easy to work with. Kandice made the process of buying a home easier and less stressful.

Kandice has patience for days. She answered all our questions no matter how they came at her promptly and professionally. She made use feel like what we wanted mattered and we wasn't just a hurry up and get paid situation. I'm a 15 year combat vet, and my grunt brain sometimes couldnt comprehend the Greek ( real estate jargon) she was saying. She stepped up and figured out a way even i could understand. She was a great representation of what a professional would do in handling everything thrown her way in every situation imagined, and man did it seem to happen.
I loooovveee Kandice.  She is communicative, reachable, ready to show our chosen houses to view (no matter how long our list), and most important to me, she is super respectful.

Kandice went above and beyond in assisting. My husband and I am preparing this rental property to go to market. She was on the spot with communication and creative marketing strategies. Highly recommend!!
Kandice was a pleasure to work with and I recommend her to anyone looking to purchase a home.
Amazing job very please your gonna do well in this business. Can't wait till next time.

Kandice made this buying experience absolutely a wonderful stress free experience.  She was extremely efficient, always willing to go the extra mile, and work above and beyond what was expected. I would love to work with her again in the future and will recommend her to people I know who are also wanting to purchase homes or land. Thank you for making this an enjoyable experience!
Kandace did a wonderful job selling the property and making sure the process was seamless, I would recommend to all!

I was SO pleased with Kandices service! She was always on the ball, communicated everything to me, and knew my expectations and met them! She didnt treat me like she knew I work in the business. 
I always reccomend her :)

Kandice was excellent in helping us purchase a house. She communicated well, was always available, and was very helpful throughout the purchasing process. We were very fortunate in having her as our realtor. Would highly recommend.

All the paperwork before the Sale is daunting, Kandice led us through. Of course all the paperwork for the Sale was worse, Kandice was right there. She kept us in the know and before you knew it, the House was our Home! Thank you Kandice ❤️

Kandice went above and beyond availablity to make sure we saw properties of interest that met wants, needs and location requirements. The property we purchased went on the market and within four hours we were viewing it and made an offer after several viewing in the same area that didn't meet expectations due to the conditions of the properties.
Kandice was super nice, and had open communication. She went above and beyond to assist! 10/10 would recommend her to everyone!
The best in the business.

First time home buyer. Had no idea even where to begin. Kandice helped me navigate a lot of unknown territories with professional and courteous service. She never gave up and we finally persevered. Thank you so much.

I was very pleased with Kandice Nowak in helping me purchase my first home. She was beyond helpful, knowledgeable, professional and friendly. I would recommend her to anyone I know that is looking to purchase a home and if I ever buy another house, I'm definitely going to her!

I called Kadice and she desponded right away. We negotiated the house and I was happy to work with Kandice. She was super efficient and I'm pleased to have worked with her. I will. I look forward to worn with Kandice on the future.
Kandice was always on time for our appointments. She advocated for us with no hesitation.  She went above and beyond our expectations.

Kandice was very accommodating to us. We live out of town and she was willing to show at our convenience. Very knowledgeable and would answer any question and if she couldn't would find out. Good experience. 

Kandice Worked hard to get us the best deal and the things fixed we asked for. 

Excellent job

Kandice, was amazing in helping us buy our first home! She walked us through everything and got answers for all of our questions or concerns, even helped put in our offer on our house when on vacation! I would recommend her to anyone who is looking for a relator.

Kandice is an old friend and I wanted to work with someone who I knew and who I trusted to go through this whole process of purchasing my first home! She was even willing to meet me to take a look at a home after dinner when we had been looking at houses throughout the day already. She was very professional and I was always able to keep in close contact with her with any questions I had.

After several attempts at contacting our previous realtor about investment property details with no response or sense of urgency we decided to look for a new realtor who was hungry for clients.  Kandice was it!! She responded quickly to our questions and submitted multiple offers for us. She treated us as if we were buying a million dollar home all while closing on a 72k property. We literally had other realtors not even give us the time of day in this price range.  We will use her for every purchase moving forward. Very valuable to know her!
